findings.blocker: Genuine Mathlib gap: `(M ⊗_psh N).stalk x ≅ M.stalk x ⊗_{R₀.stalk x} N.stalk x` for varying-ring `PresheafOfModules R₀` is absent from Mathlib. Mathlib has `tensorLeft.PreservesColimitsOfSize` / `tensorRight.PreservesColimitsOfSize` (presheaf-tensor preserves colimits, hence stalks as colimits in the abstract) but the explicit identification with the stalk-ring tensor is not packaged.
